sourceMovie.title: Ender's Game
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Ender's Game works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ender's Game clicked for you, Guardians of the Galaxy (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ender's Game?
faq.answer: Try Guardians of the Galaxy, Star Wars: The Force Awakens, Rogue One: A Star Wars Story—each shares DNA with Ender's Game while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ender's Game?
faq.answer: Ender's Game (2013) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ender's Game worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
